node.statement: MISSING — LCU (Linear Combination of Unitaries): Not implemented beyond abstract type stub. Needed for: (1) assembling the preconditioner as a linear combination of interpolation operator block encodings (Theorem 10), (2) the block encoding multiplication lemma (GSLW19) used throughout Section 7. LCU requires state preparation pairs (P_L, P_R) and a select(W) unitary — both expressible via Sturm.jl primitives.
